title: helichrysum congolanum
intro: Helichrysum congolanum, also known as the African helichrysum, is a flowering plant species within the sunflower family, characterized by its small yellow flowers and needle-like leaves. The medicinal properties of Helichrysum congolanum are attributed to its essential oil, which contains compounds like nerolidol and chamazulene. The health benefits of this plant include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties, which can aid in reducing pain and inflammation, promoting wound healing, and protecting against cell damage. Helichrysum congolanum is typically prepared as an essential oil or infused in herbal teas, and it can also be used topically as a cream or salve, although its effectiveness and safety should be further researched and confirmed.
